body.raw:
# Tooltip

## Import

```jsx live=false
import { Tooltip } from '@totejs/uikit';
```

## Usage

If the children of `Tooltip` is a `string`, we should wrap with in a `span`. If the `Tooltip` is
wrapping a functional component, ensure that the functional component accepts a `ref` using
`forwardRef`.

```jsx
<Tooltip
  content={
    'If the children of Tooltip is a string, we should wrap with in a span. If the Tooltip is wrapping a functional component, ensure that the functional component accepts a ref using forwardRef.'
  }
  placement={['bottom', 'top', 'follow']}
>
  <Button>Show Tooltip</Button>
</Tooltip>
```

## Placement

```jsx
function Example() {
  const placements = [
    'auto',
    'auto-start',
    'auto-end',
    'top',
    'top-start',
    'top-end',
    'bottom',
    'bottom-start',
    'bottom-end',
    'right',
    'right-start',
    'right-end',
    'left',
    'left-start',
    'left-end',
  ];

  return (
    <SimpleGrid columns={3} gap={24}>
      {placements.map((item, index) => (
        <Tooltip content={item} placement={item} key={item}>
          <Button size="lg">{item}</Button>
        </Tooltip>
      ))}
    </SimpleGrid>
  );
}
```

## Disabled

```jsx
<Wrap>
  <Tooltip content={'Some text in tooltip.'} isDisabled>
    <Button isDisabled={true}>Show Tooltip</Button>
  </Tooltip>

  <Tooltip content={'Some text in tooltip.'} isDisabled>
    <Button>Show Tooltip</Button>
  </Tooltip>
</Wrap>
```

      type: "'follow' | 'auto' | 'auto-start' | 'auto-end' | 'top' | 'top-start' | 'top-end' | 'bottom' | 'bottom-start' | 'bottom-end' | 'right' | 'right-start' | 'right-end' | 'left' | 'left-start' | 'left-end'",
      default: '',
      desc: "Support responsive array, e.g. ['bottom', 'top', 'follow']",
    },
    {
      name: 'onHide',
      required: false,
      type: '() => void',
      default: '',
      desc: 'Invoked once when tooltip begins to hide.',
    },
  ]}
/>
